description_long: This flower shop is a small, standalone commercial building with a rectangular structure and a flat roof. The exterior features a prominent sign above the entrance, with a yellowish-brown color scheme and visible text. The shop is surrounded by a patch of ground, possibly dirt or mulch, and there are vertical supports or posts at the front. The building appears to have large windows or open areas on the front and sides, allowing visibility into the interior. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. The shop is compact, likely designed for walk-in customers in an urban or neighborhood setting.
description: A compact, rectangular flower shop with a flat roof, prominent signage, and open front supported by posts, set on a patch of ground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, signage, and supporting posts, with the ground area clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building and the extension of the ground area to the left.
description_view_2: Close-up angled view focusing on the front and one side, with signage and window details most visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side of the shop, with less detail on the entrance and more ground visible.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular sign above the entrance with visible text in a dark font on a yellow-brown background, spanning the width of the shop front.
